Class AbilityListener

java.lang.Object
dev.agam.skyblockitems.abilities.AbilityListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class AbilityListener extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
Main listener for handling ability activations. Updated to support MMOItems Set Bonuses via PlayerData.
